---
name: Bug report
about: Something in SundayRec isn't working the way it should
title: "[bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## What happened?

A clear, short description of what went wrong.
*Example: "The Sunday 11:00 recording didn't start — when I came in on Monday the file list was empty."*

## What did you expect to happen?

*Example: "A file called `2026-05-24-1100.mp3` to appear in my recordings folder."*

## Steps to reproduce

If you can reliably reproduce the bug, list the exact steps:

1.
2.
3.

If it's intermittent (e.g. "happens once a month"), say so — we'll work with you to narrow it down.

## Environment

| | |
|---|---|
| SundayRec version | (e.g. 4.30.1 — see *Innstillinger → Om* in the app) |
| Operating system | (e.g. macOS 14.5 Sonoma, or Windows 11 23H2) |
| Architecture | (Apple Silicon M2 / Intel Mac / Windows x64) |
| Audio device | (e.g. Behringer UMC404HD, built-in mic) |
| Cloud provider, if relevant | (Google Drive / Dropbox / none) |

## Logs

If possible, attach a log file. You can export it from **Innstillinger → Avansert → Eksporter logg**.

If the log is short you can paste it inline in a fenced code block:

```
(paste log here)
```

## Screenshots

If it's a visual bug, drag a screenshot into this textbox — GitHub will upload it for you.

## Anything else?

Anything we should know — workarounds you've tried, related issues, gut feeling about what might be wrong.
